app.name: Worldwright
app.tagline: An atlas of every world you will ever invent.

auth.title: Open the atlas.
auth.subtitle: Sign in to enter the codex.
auth.footer: Worldwright is bound for you alone, until you say otherwise.
auth.needAdmin: Editing the codex requires admin role.

errors.invalid: These credentials do not open the codex.
errors.generic: Something snagged the lock. Try again.

entities.title: Entities
entities.subtitle: Every place, person, deity, and rumour in your atlas.

assets.title: Asset library
assets.lede: Every chart, portrait, and emblem pressed into the codex.
assets.confirmDelete: Delete this asset? Any embeds will break.

account.title: Your account
account.displayNamePlaceholder: The name shown beside your hand
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
account.passwordMismatch: The two new passwords do not match.
account.noPasswordYet: No password set yet — define one to enable email sign-in.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.tip: Press ? anytime to open this overlay.

pwa.installBody: Add the codex to your home screen for quicker access.
pwa.updateBody: A fresh build is ready. Reload to bind it.

tags.title: Tags
tags.lede: Cross-cutting threads that bind unrelated entries together.
tags.empty: No tags yet — assign one on any entry.

entity.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Child entries will be moved to the root.

editor.eyebrowNew: Vol. I · Fold a new leaf
editor.newLede: Set the title first; everything else can be amended.

sidebar.empty: No entries yet. Bind the first.
sidebar.reorderFailed: Could not save the new order.

timelines.title: Timelines
timelines.lede: Curated chronologies — pick the events that tell one thread of your world's story.
timelines.newLede: Name the thread, pick the events. Add and remove anytime.
timelines.eyebrowNew: Vol. I · A new thread of time
timelines.noEvents: No events in this timeline yet.

maps.title: Maps
maps.lede: Coastlines, marches, and the things that hide in their margins.
maps.newLede: Upload an image, name it, and drop pins. Maps may nest — pin a continent to its region.
maps.editHint: Click the canvas to drop a pin. Drag pins to reposition. Click a pin to edit its label and links.
maps.confirmDeleteMap: Delete this map and all its pins?
maps.label: Label

form.name: Name
form.parentHint: Pin this map to a continent, region, or city…

calendars.title: Calendars
calendars.lede: Every calendar your world keeps — months that never were, weekdays you named, moons that argue.
calendars.name: Name
calendars.phasesEmpty: This moon has no defined phases — add one above.

events.title: Events
events.lede: Dated occurrences in the chronicle of your world.
events.eyebrowNew: Vol. I · A new entry in the chronicle
events.newLede: When did it happen, where, and to whom?

editor.title: Threads & their tellers
editor.descHint: An optional inscription on the edge.
editor.missing: Select a relationship and a target first.
editor.failed: Could not bind the thread. Try again.

home.lede: Your codex stands open. Choose a thread to pull.

onboarding.eyebrow: The first opening of the codex
onboarding.title: How shall we begin?
onboarding.subtitle: The atlas has been prepared with a sample world so you can explore the codex. Choose how you would like to start — you can change your mind later.
onboarding.confirmPrune: This will permanently remove the sample world. Continue?
onboarding.confirmImport: This will erase the current codex and replace it with the imported world. Continue?

errors.generic: Something snagged the binding. Try again.
errors.importFailed: The import could not be completed.

keep.title: Explore the sample world
keep.body: Browse the codex as-is with the example entities, tags, and calendar. You can clear the sample later from your account settings.

prune.title: Start from a blank page
prune.body: Remove the sample world entirely. You will begin with an empty codex and the core types ready for your own entries.

import.title: Import from LegendKeeper
import.body: Upload a LegendKeeper world export (.json). The current codex will be cleared and the export imported, with images downloaded from LegendKeeper.
import.running: Importing — this can take a while…
import.note: Currently only LegendKeeper exports are supported. Maps and pins are imported best-effort; mentions become wikilinks.

pruneSeed.label: The sample world
pruneSeed.body: Remove the sample entities, tags, calendar, and other seed content. Your own entries are untouched.
pruneSeed.confirm: Remove all sample data? This cannot be undone.
